title: RBI Amendment Directions on 'Matters to be Placed Before the Boards of Banks'
description: <cite index="32-3">RBI finalised four parallel sets of Amendment Directions on July 14, 2026 — one each for Commercial Banks, Small Finance Banks (SFBs), Payments Banks, and Local Area Banks (LABs) — all structured identically and effective from October 1, 2026.</cite> <cite index="32-2">Draft Amendment Directions were proposed to drop the seven themes in favour of principle-based guidance.</cite>
